findings.description: The knowledge file's XML example for MultiThreadExecutionHandler omits the `commitLogger` property present in the source.
Three PascalCase handler class names present in the s2 content are missing from hints: `HttpAccessLogHandler`, `NablarchTagHandler`, `MessageResendHandler`.
findings.source_evidence: Source lists all three under 画面オンライン処理/メッセージング処理固有ハンドラ; they appear in the s2 section content.

findings.description: `GlobalErrorHandler` is a PascalCase class name that appears in the s3 XML code example but is absent from the s3 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source XML: `<component class="nablarch.fw.handler.GlobalErrorHandler" />`; appears in the knowledge file s3 XML block.
